# Robustness Summary (autogenerated)

Setup:
- Length buckets use train quartiles (word-count edges): [34.0, 39.0, 45.0]
- Keywords use train only TF-IDF deltas (top 6 per class)
- Random control words are frequency matched on train data
- Masked keywords (n=24): afp, cup, fullquote, game, internet, iraq, iraqi, killed, league, microsoft, minister, music, oil, percent, president, prices, reuters, search, season, software, space, stocks, team, win
- Random control words (n=24): agreed, big, billion, business, computer, earnings, firm, general, help, higher, href, investor, investors, just, london, man, months, network, news, play, quickinfo, red, sports, trade
- Mask coverage on test: keyword docs=3733, keyword matches=7273, random docs=2281, random matches=3459
